accessible_description: Warm paper-like panels, bright lettering, and tabbed archive shapes suggest a lamplit civic collection; icons, borders, and words communicate every state without color.
non_color_cues: Selected controls use an inset frame and a check mark.
Warnings use an octagonal icon and the word Warning.
Current-turn panels use a clipped corner and a Current turn heading.
border_style: Inset archive-card frames with clipped upper corners
heading_style: Wide catalogue headings with explicit text labels
